candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet; best match for ACT.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred than explicit total line.
Component of current assets, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred for CHE.
Also an exact cash-equivalents total line; acceptable backup across years.
Broader than pure cash equivalents because it may include short-term investments; less preferred.
Broader aggregate including short-term investments; less preferred than pure cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Preferred pure cash-equivalents labels over cash plus short-term investments.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; best match for LCT.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred.
Only a component of current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best match to baseline STD because it explicitly excludes lease liabilities/capitalized leases.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Includes current debt but appears to include lease current portion based on matching values to lease-inclusive line; less preferred.
Represents within-1-year maturities but appears lease-inclusive and duplicates the broader short-term debt/current portion total.
Would capture short-term borrowings, but values are blank and likely not needed given clean current portion line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose the clean lease-excluded current debt line per STD baseline. Avoided lease-inclusive totals to prevent including capitalized leases and double counting.

candidates.why: Direct current taxes payable line on the balance sheet; best match for TXP.
Includes long-term plus short-term taxes, so broader than payable/current taxes target.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but this is a clear exact taxes payable/current tax liability row.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Also total net PPE and identical here; acceptable backup.
Gross PPE exists but net total is preferred.
Component/odd residual line, not total PPE.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

variables.notes: Preferred reported total net PPE lines.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; best match for AT.

variables.notes: There is one populated 'Total Assets' row and one blank header-like duplicate; selected the reported populated total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.
Section/header label rather than numeric net cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
